name: whatsapp-bridge
description: Self-hosted WhatsApp bridge for AI agents — REST + MCP + web UI, built on Baileys.

scripts.stop: launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u)/local.whatsapp-bridge && echo 'whatsapp-bridge daemon stopped'
scripts.restart: launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u)/local.whatsapp-bridge 2>/dev/null; launchctl bootstrap gui/$(id -u) $HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/local.whatsapp-bridge.plist && echo 'whatsapp-bridge daemon restarted'
scripts.status: echo 'whatsapp-bridge:'; launchctl print gui/$(id -u)/local.whatsapp-bridge 2>/dev/null | grep 'state =' || echo '  not loaded'; echo 'wa-autoreply:'; launchctl print gui/$(id -u)/local.wa-autoreply 2>/dev/null | grep 'state =' || echo '  not loaded'
scripts.health: TOKEN=$(grep '^API_TOKEN=' .env | head -1 | cut -d= -f2); curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/health; echo
scripts.autoreply:stop: launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u)/local.wa-autoreply && echo 'autoreply sidecar stopped (launchd agent unloaded)'
scripts.autoreply:start: launchctl bootstrap gui/$(id -u) $HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/local.wa-autoreply.plist && echo 'autoreply sidecar started'
scripts.autoreply:restart: launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u)/local.wa-autoreply 2>/dev/null; launchctl bootstrap gui/$(id -u) $HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/local.wa-autoreply.plist && echo 'autoreply sidecar restarted'
scripts.autoreply:status: TOKEN=$(grep '^AUTOREPLY_TOKEN=' .env | head -1 | cut -d= -f2); curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://127.0.0.1:8081/policy; echo
scripts.autoreply:off: TOKEN=$(grep '^AUTOREPLY_TOKEN=' .env | head -1 | cut -d= -f2); curl -s -X PUT -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://127.0.0.1:8081/policy -d '{"mode":"off","scope":"all","contacts":[],"groups":[],"active_until":null,"active_hours":null,"notes":"off via npm run autoreply:off"}'; echo
